## LinkedIn (Long-form)

### Announcement Post

**From idea to launch — AI-guided startup support**

I'm excited to share Access To Business — a free, open-source AI tool for aspiring entrepreneurs, small business owners, and startup mentors.

Here's the problem: Startup guide, entrepreneur support, business launch. But navigating this space is complex, and most people don't have a specialist by their side.

Access To Business changes that. It's a Claude Skill — upload one file to Claude, and it becomes your business expert. No code, no cost.

What you can do:
1. Build a lean business plan with market validation steps
2. Navigate Missouri business registration and licensing
3. Identify startup funding sources and grant programs

It's part of the Access To ecosystem — 6 pillars, 7 projects, all open source.

Try it: github.com/dougdevitre/access-to-business
Learn more: https://dougdevitre.org

#AccessTo #CivicTech #AI #OpenSource #Business
